Tickets There is a hard limit for RSVP :) Wait list will be operating on Meetup. Location The event is hosted at Stripe's offices. Rough timings 6:00 pm - 6:30 pm: Doors open with refreshments 6:30 pm - 7:45 pm: Talks & Q&A 7:45 pm - 8:00 pm: Drinks, food, & networking Talks Accept payments from Phinite Agent using Stripe ACP - Shashank Somal Founder & CEO of Phinite.ai Link for agents - Dan HIll, Head of Consumer Product (Link) at Stripe Don't miss this opportunity to connect with the Stripe community. gary_2026_07_21_the_shortlist_founder_sh.title: The Shortlist Founder Showcase
gary_2026_07_21_the_shortlist_founder_sh.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_21_the_shortlist_founder_sh.summary: Gary's Guide: The Shortlist NYC - July Founder Showcase (#6) The Shortlist is back for our monthly Founder Showcase & the room keeps getting better. This is a monthly curated, application-only evening connecting early-stage founders with exceptional operators across New York. No panels. No pitches to VCs. Just six founders building breakout companies, a room full of people who've built things themselves, & the kind of candid conversation you don't get at most events. Each founder will share what they're building, why it matters, & the specific roles they're actively hiring for right now - followed by a mixer. What to expect: Founders presenting at the seed through Series B stage. Operators, builders, & executives who've seen what good looks like. An intentionally small room designed for real connection. Who this is for: Exceptional operators - whether you're actively exploring your next role, casually curious, or simply want to stay close to what's being built in NYC right now. Founders will be announced in the days leading up to the event. Attendance is intentionally limited. Apply to be considered. More information on The Shortlist can be found here. Founded by Andrew Yeung & Ivor Straford.

In a single morning, you'll gain actionable insights, learn new perspectives, & meet peers also looking to move forward.

gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.title: Startup Founders, Investors & Talent Mixer
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.place: St Pat's Bar & Grill, 22 W 46th St
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.summary: Gary's Guide: Join a curated startup networking event in New York bringing together founders, investors, operators, engineers, & startup professionals for an evening of meaningful conversations & valuable connections. Unlike traditional networking events, the focus is on real discussions, practical insights, & opportunities that extend beyond the event itself. The evening includes: Structured networking sessions covering fundraising, product development, hiring, go-to-market strategy, & startup growth. Startup pitches featuring selected founders presenting their companies to investors, operators, & experienced entrepreneurs. Open networking sessions designed to help attendees build relationships & continue conversations. Attendees include: Startup founders from pre-seed to Series A Angel investors & venture capital professionals Product managers, engineers, & startup operators Recruiters & hiring leaders Sales & business development professionals Entrepreneurs building in AI, SaaS, FinTech, & emerging technologies Selected startups will have the opportunity to pitch their companies & receive feedback from investors & experienced founders. Investor participation is complimentary upon approval. Hosted by Ascent Valley, a global community connecting founders, investors, & operators through events, networking, & startup initiatives. Whether you are building a company, seeking investment opportunities, hiring talent, or expanding your network, this event offers an opportunity to connect with New York's startup ecosystem.

gary_2026_07_22_founder_pizza_night_seed.title: Founder Pizza Night - Seed To Series B
gary_2026_07_22_founder_pizza_night_seed.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_22_founder_pizza_night_seed.summary: Gary's Guide: Founder meetup for venture-backed Seed, Series A, & Series B founders building in NYC hosted by Concentrate AI. Hosted at Mama's TOO in the West Village (one of NYC's best pizza shops) & they rarely do private events. Unlimited pizza. Come hungry. The room will be mostly founders, with a few spots for exceptional operators. No agenda, no speakers, no panels. Completely off the record. The first 10 founders to arrive will get $1K in free tokens. Additionally, for attendees only, we will match your first $25K in tokens purchased in July. A ticket is required for entry. We won't be able to admit walk-ins. - Hosted by Concentrate AI - Concentrate AI gives teams one API for every major AI model, with automatic fallbacks, unified observability & logging, spend tracking, usage analytics, & alerts. Concentrate AI has raised $5M & is backed by RRE Ventures & True Ventures. Please Note By attending, you consent to photo/video use. You also attend at your own risk; we're not liable for any loss, injury, or damage.

gary_2026_07_23_the_builder_series_found.title: The Builder Series - Founder, Investor & Operator Nights
gary_2026_07_23_the_builder_series_found.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_23_the_builder_series_found.summary: Gary's Guide: The Builder Series: A 45,000+ member community redefining what networking looks like - curating founders, operators, investors & more into intentional rooms built for experiences people remember & relationships that last. It's a direct line to the most ambitious builders, with a community that actually shows up. We've hosted 13 signature rooftop mixers & co-hosted 70+ events. We also host: Founder & investor-led panels curated by sector Intimate penthouse & dinners for our Seed-Series A+ founders & investors in our network A A Fri-Sat morning Run Club Notable events: Cliqk Launch Party w/ Ilias Anwar & Rohan Gurram (2,000+ RSVPs) $1.5M Pitch Competition with FounderSquare Find us here: Instagram LinkedIn TikTok Facebook X Community Snapshot: 7,000+ RSVPs 996 unique attendees 80+ avg RSVPs/event Who's in the room: Founders ~48% Operators & Senior Professionals ~44% Investors & Advisors ~8% (Angels, VCs, Family Offices) Founder stage: ~67% Pre-Seed ~17% Seed ~5% Series A ~6% Series B+ ~5% Bootstrapped Industries: 23% AI/Deep Tech 23% SaaS/B2B 13% Consumer 13% Fintech 10% Health 7% Media Investor check sizes: ~30% Small bites served mid-way through event: Pictured below Photographer: Headshots, group photos, candid moments & shots at our branded backdrop Videographer: Recap footage + our founder interview Founder Spotlight (Series): Share who you are & what you're building for reuse on socials across all our socials Attendees will receive a NFC digital business card upon entry, thanks to SmartCard Concierge Check in: A member of our team greets you, fits your wristband, & walks you through the event Events Partner SmartCard: A subscription-free digital business card made from aerospace-grade titanium that instantly shares your contact info & social media with just a tap while also capturing the contact details of the person you're speaking with. Schedule: 6:00 - 7:00 PM - Arrival + Concierge Check-In 7:00 PM - Food Served 7:15 - 7:30 PM - Group Photo + Announcements 7:30 - 8:30 PM - Founder Spotlights + Interviews 7:30 - 9:00 PM - Open Networking More Details Tickets required for all attendees (+1s included) Sponsorship inquiries: dylan@thebuilderseries.co, partnerships@thebuilderseries.co 917-242-2821 / Business WhatsApp Join The Builder Series network: Apply here or by email dylan@thebuilderseries.co The Builder Series: Event Disclaimer, Media Consent & Code of Conduct: Click to view By registering or attending The Builder Series event, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, & agree to abide by all policies, rules, & community standards set by The Builder Series. PLEASE NOTE Tickets are non-refundable unless the event is canceled & not rescheduled. Tickets are non-refundable unless the event is canceled. Refund & Transfer Policy Transfers. If you can no longer attend, you may transfer your ticket to someone else by providing the new attendee's name to the organizers. No refunds. Tickets are non-refundable. No monetary exchanges will be issued by the organizers. Event credit. If you miss an event, you may receive credit toward a future event. Credit expires 30 days after the missed event's date. Weather cancellations. If an event has to be rescheduled due to weather, you will be re-registered for the new date. Spotlight tickets. Spotlight tickets are fully non-refundable. If you can't attend, you may speak at a future event instead. Out-of-state purchases. The only refundable tickets are those purchased from outside New York - for example, from Toronto, California, or Austin. Connect with Me: Join 45,000+ people shaping the future Join the Newsletter Follow the Builder Series Find me here

gary_2026_07_23_agentic_aperitivo_ladies.title: Agentic Aperitivo - Ladies' Cocktail Hour
gary_2026_07_23_agentic_aperitivo_ladies.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_23_agentic_aperitivo_ladies.summary: Gary's Guide: Release yourself from the office & your favorite sundress from the closet as we escape to the Amalfi Coast for an exclusive afternoon at an iconic West Village institution. Join the Baselaydies & the brightest minds shaping the future of agentic commerce for an exclusive, high-energy cocktail hour. We're serving up sun-drenched Italian vibes, passed apps, artisanal cheese & charcuterie, & custom craft cocktails - because the best things are still human (and certainly women)-in-the-loop. Come for the chic coastal escape & photo opp; leave with the powerful connections driving the agentic economy forward. All agents, no gents. Space is strictly limited to maintain an intimate atmosphere. Register now to claim your seat & your spritz.

gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.title: Founder Strength Club
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. This time, we're doing something a little different. Instead of a seated breakfast, we're bringing together 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a private strength-based networking experience at a premier gym in New York. The session will be a 60-minute group workout class designed specifically to help ambitious founders connect in a more active, energizing environment. Expect a moderate-intensity strength class that is approachable for different fitness levels, but still requires the ability to participate in a full physical training session. After class, we'll have time to cool down, connect, & continue conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders. What to expect: A private group strength class at a premier gym in New York Conversations with fellow ambitious founders, CEOs, & builders A post-class networking moment to meet peers solving similar problems Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together - this time, with a little sweat involved. Details: Date: July 24, 2026 Time: 9:00am - 11:00am Venue: Premier Gym in New York Please note: This experience includes a physical group training class. You should be comfortable participating in approximately 60 minutes of moderate-intensity exercise. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form. About our hosts & sponsors: Andrew Yeung is the Founder, CEO of fibe - a portfolio of events companies including andrew's mixers, The Junto Series & Lumos House. & the OOO Summit. He is also a Partner at Next Wave NYC, a pre-seed/seed found backed by Flybridge Capital. Andrew's hosted 100+ events for 50k+ tech founders & professionals in 8 cities that were featured in Bloomberg, Business Insider, Fast Company, & Fortune Magazine. Business Insider dubbed him the "Gatsby of Silicon Alley." Rho is the all-in-one banking platform for startups. With banking set up in minutes, 2% cashback cards, & powerful tools for managing spend, paying bills, & closing the books, Rho helps high-growth startups move fast & stay focused-with support that goes to the ends of the earth to help you win. Lowenstein Sandler's ECVC group delivers tailored legal strategies for launching, scaling, & financing companies in life sciences & healthcare. They close thousands of deals each year & advise founders on financings, licensing, & IP.

gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.title: NJ Code & Coffee
gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.summary: Gary's Guide: Calling all New Jersey techies to the monthly NJ Code & Coffee tech community meetup at the EqualSpace ES550 Tech & Innovation campus! Code & Coffee is an inclusive, informal networking/co-working session for those in tech (and the tech-curious). That includes operators, founders, & investors. Developers, data engineers, UX/UI designers, data scientists, product managers, software engineers, solution architects... all are welcome! People of all skill & experience levels can attend, we love it that way. Many people (optionally) bring projects to work on, & many other people (optionally) socialize the entire time. It's entirely up to you! Come grab a cup of coffee & meet new people, share stories, find collaborators, talk about everything tech, talk about everything NOT tech, take a break from job applications, get away from the computer screen, make connections, make conversation, make friends! Agenda: 2pm: Doors open, networking starts 2:30pm: Intro circle 3pm: networking continues 5pm: event ends The Intro Circle Near the beginning of the event (about 2:30 pm), we will do a standup in a circle: We first talk about organizer announcements, updates, & logistics. Then we go around the circle where each person says: *your name & job title/ role in tech/ tech stack, What you can help others with, *What you would like help with, Job opportunities you're hiring for OR announce that you are looking for one. If none, that's cool. After the introduction circle, everything is self-organized. Community Discord - come hang out before & after!: www.codeandcoffee.chat The Venue Equal Space is a premium share-space created with multicultural business owners in mind, =SPACE equips founders with resources, programming & a powerful network. Headquartered in the City of Newark, their share-space provides resources for startups, coaching for tech companies, & a wealth of intellectuals to collaborate & build with. The next wave in enterprises is being born within their walls. Become a part of the story: [EqualSpace.co/](https://equalspace.co/)

gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.title: B2B - AI Founders & Investors Meetup
gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.summary: Gary's Guide: NYC B2B is the premier community for B2B Founders, Operators, & Investors in NYC. NYC B2B often hosts happy hour events for founders, builders, & investors based in NYC. This is an exclusive event for B2B AI founders & investors. Want to sponsor this event? Email: newyorkcityventures@gmail.com This meetup is hosted by NYC B2B. It's a great way to meet other founders, builders, & investors. Whether you're building a company, exploring a side project, or considering a new idea, we would love to have you here. NYC B2B has previously hosted events for thousands of B2B startup founders + operators in NYC across Vertical SaaS, AI, FinTech, Healthcare, DevTools, Infrastructure, & more. By signing up, you are confirming your interest in hearing about more events from NYC B2B in the future via email! NYC B2B also helps connect those who sign up with awesome partners. Note: This is a 21+ event. Please let our team know in advance if you'd like to bring a guest, as unregistered +1s will not be admitted. Attendees who disregard this policy may not be invited to future NYC B2B events. - Hiring or looking for jobs? startupjobs.nyc

gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. Each month, we invite 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a 3-hour, multiple-course dinner experience. What to expect: A 3-course meal, courtesy of our partners Conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders A dinner experience designed to facilitate new connections & conversations, with rotating 6-person table formats Meaningful connections with ambitious peers solving similar problems If you're wondering how our dinners usually go... read this Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together. Details: Date: July 28, 2026 Time: 6:00pm - 8:30pm Venue: Private Dinner Club in NYC Past attendees of my events include the founders/C-suite of Venmo, Duolingo, Foursquare, Lyft, Goldman Sachs, Compass, Superhuman, Yext, OpenDoor, Chief, LearnVest, DocSend, Vercel, Loom, Morning Brew, The Hustle, Gas, Teachable, Replit, Twitter, Slack, Pinterest, Yahoo, MongoDB, Business Insider, Wonder, Hinge. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form.

gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.title: Padel w/ Founders
gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.place: Mink Padel at Harlem, 439 W 127th St
gary_2026_07_28_padel_w_founders.summary: Gary's Guide: Oceans Talent & Mink Padel invite you to eat, drink, learn & PLAY PADEL . Join us for an evening with fellow founders & learn how to leverage global talent to scale operations & build brands. What to expect: Break a sweat: pick up a racket & join a padel game (beginners & advanced players welcome!) Eat: delicious bites from our favorite local Vietnamese spot Hydrate: beers, seltzers, & refreshers! Network: meet fellow founders across CPG, tech, law & creative media Learn: how your peers are solving problems & scaling operations Most importantly, come to have fun! This is a private event. RSVP via Partiful link is required. Please reach out to marietta@oceanstalent.com for more information.

gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.title: JFE Startup & Tech Rooftop Mixer
gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.summary: Gary's Guide: JFE Network is excited to host its first Startup & Tech Rooftop Mixer in Hudson Yards, NY, with views overlooking the city! Join NY's premier startup & tech community for a fun summer gathering for networking & a great time connecting with our startup & tech network. JFE Networking mixers bring together NY's top startup founders, technologists, & business professionals in the Jewish community. If you're looking for co-founders to launch a startup or new career opportunities in tech, then you should join us! Many of our attendees formed deep relationships, hired each other, or started companies together. JFE (Jews For Entrepreneurship) Network For those who don't know about us, JFE (Jews For Entrepreneurship organization) is the leading & only organization that supports Jewish innovation & entrepreneurship worldwide. Since our launch in 2009, we have hosted over 120 events, including pitch events, seminars, speaker panels, startup accelerators, pitches for series A companies, career fairs, & networking mixers. We are now actively hosting events in SF, LA, Miami, NY, London, & New Mexico Read more about us here: www.jfenetwork.com

gary_2026_07_29_junto_founder_dinner.title: Junto Founder Dinner
gary_2026_07_29_junto_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_29_junto_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. Each month, we invite 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a 3-hour, multiple-course dinner experience. What to expect: A 3-course meal, courtesy of our partners Conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders A dinner experience designed to facilitate new connections & conversations, with rotating 6-person table formats Meaningful connections with ambitious peers solving similar problems If you're wondering how our dinners usually go... read this Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together. Details: Date: July 29, 2026 Time: 6:00pm - 8:30pm Venue: Private Dinner Club in NYC Past attendees of my events include the founders/C-suite of Venmo, Duolingo, Foursquare, Lyft, Goldman Sachs, Compass, Superhuman, Yext, OpenDoor, Chief, LearnVest, DocSend, Vercel, Loom, Morning Brew, The Hustle, Gas, Teachable, Replit, Twitter, Slack, Pinterest, Yahoo, MongoDB, Business Insider, Wonder, Hinge. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form. About our Hosts & Sponsors: Andrew Yeung is the founder of Fibe & The Shortlist NYC. He is also an angel investor & Partner at Next Wave NYC, a pre-seed venture fund. Andrew has hosted over 300 events for 50,000 founders, operators, investors, & tech professionals that were featured by Bloomberg, Business Insider, Fast Company, Fortune Magazine, Axios, Newsweek, & Forbes. Business Insider dubbed him the "Gatsby of Silicon Alley." Fidelity brings certainty to startup founders & leaders with our automated cap table & equity management platform. No matter where you are on your journey, Fidelity has the expertise & robust support to help guide you. Looking for an alternative to your current equity management solution? Our team will guide you through a smooth transition to our platform. Comp AI helps startups get SOC 2 or ISO 27001 audit-ready in just a few days, without slowing down the team. Evidence collection, controls, vendor management, & audit prep run on autopilot, so you stay audit-ready 24/7. Trusted by fast-growing teams like Dub, Better Auth, & Corgi. As a thank-you for joining us tonight, you get $2,000 off compliance. Manifest Law is a modern immigration law firm built for founders, startups, & fast-growing companies. Manifest specializes in securing visas & work authorization for immigrant entrepreneurs & top global talent, helping companies navigate complex U.S. immigration pathways with speed, clarity, & a startup-first mindset-so builders can focus on scaling, not paperwork Get on the list for future events: Twitter Instagram Website

gary_2026_07_30_buzzfeed_ai_demos_happy_.title: BuzzFeed AI Demos & Happy Social Hour
gary_2026_07_30_buzzfeed_ai_demos_happy_.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_30_buzzfeed_ai_demos_happy_.summary: Gary's Guide: If your idea of a fun Thursday involves seeing cool AI projects & wondering, "Wait... how did they make that?" Come hang out with us. BuzzFeed is teaming up with NYC AI Coworking for an afternoon of live demos from builders across the community. You'll see BuzzFeed's latest projects, Conjure & Rat Race, along with a lineup of demos from members of Chris's network who have been busy making all kinds of weird, clever, & genuinely impressive things. Then we'll trade demos for drinks. Stick around for a laid-back happy social hour with seltzers, AI challenges, good conversations, & plenty of time to meet the people behind the projects. Ask questions, swap ideas, give feedback, or just nerd out about AI with people who won't glaze over after thirty seconds. Whether you build AI for a living, tinker with it on weekends, or just like seeing what people are making, we'd love to have you. Thursday, July 30 3:00-5:00 PM Flatiron Come for the demos. Stay because you accidentally started a 20-minute conversation about prompting & poltergeists.
